cliUsageGuide.title: 1. Find the strongest Hyperliquid traders
cliUsageGuide.reason: Seeds the board with traders who already proved they can survive over time.

cliUsageGuide.title: 2. Reconstruct how they actually win
cliUsageGuide.reason: Turns raw fills into hold windows, large-bet win rate, patience, and campaign history.

cliUsageGuide.title: 3. Pull their live exposure
cliUsageGuide.reason: Shows current open positions, live size, unrealized PnL, adds, and concentration.

cliUsageGuide.title: 4. Downrank fake edge from tiny samples
cliUsageGuide.command: board logic: rebuild campaigns + Wilson-trust the win rate
cliUsageGuide.reason: The site does not trust raw percentages blindly. It reconstructs campaigns from CLI fills and lowers confidence when the sample is tiny.
